title: Firmware / OS Update
description: Apply a firmware or network OS update safely with rollback readiness.
safety_notes: Disruptive — requires an approved maintenance window.
Confirm console / out-of-band access before changing anything that affects reachability.
Have the current image and a rollback plan staged before starting.

steps.title: Pre-flight checks
steps.instruction: Confirm: approved window, target version validated for this model, current config backed up, console/OOB access available, and rollback image staged. All set?
steps.safety_note: Do not proceed without OOB access and a rollback image.

steps.title: Stop — preflight failed
steps.instruction: Resolve the missing item (window, backup, OOB, or rollback image) before continuing. Restart when ready.

steps.title: Stage and verify the image
steps.instruction: Transfer the firmware image and verify its checksum against the vendor value. Checksum match?

steps.title: Apply and reload
steps.instruction: Set the boot image / apply the update and reload during the window. Watch the boot on console. Did it boot the new version cleanly?

branches.condition: Booted cleanly on the new version

steps.title: Roll back
steps.instruction: Boot the previous image via console/OOB to restore service, then escalate the failed update for analysis.

steps.title: Post-update verification
steps.instruction: Confirm version, config integrity, interfaces/neighbors up, and the service is healthy. All good?

steps.title: Complete
steps.instruction: Update successful and verified. Record the new version in inventory and close the change.
